contribution_display: Show raw production window plus normalized score and contribution
when_section_unavailable: Show unavailable production section and lower confidence instead of neutral evidence

contribution_display: Show raw first downs and 0.4 LVE scoring contribution
warning_display: Show missing first downs|estimated first downs|source gap
when_section_unavailable: Show first-down data unavailable and do not infer direct first-down evidence

contribution_display: Show opportunity denominator and normalized usage contribution
when_section_unavailable: Show usage unavailable and prevent hidden role certainty

contribution_display: Show snap share as role proxy with contribution and limitation
warning_display: Show proxy-only role|missing snap share|low snap sample
when_section_unavailable: Show role proxy unavailable and keep route role separate

contribution_display: Show raw projected stats and recomputed LVE contribution
warning_display: Show local baseline not forecast|missing projection|source mismatch
when_section_unavailable: Show projection unavailable and retain confidence penalty

contribution_display: Show age bucket and position-specific contribution
warning_display: Show age not available|cliff-risk window|fragility interaction
when_section_unavailable: Show age unavailable and flag identity or bio source gap

contribution_display: Show injury as context and confidence effect only
warning_display: Show unsourced healthy row|stale injury|missing injury source
when_section_unavailable: Show injury context unavailable without boosting confidence

contribution_display: Show draft/prospect prior separately from NFL evidence
warning_display: Show missing draft capital|prior too dominant|missing NFL evidence
when_section_unavailable: Show prior unavailable for eligible young players and flag review

contribution_display: Show why confidence is strong usable review weak or blocked
warning_display: Show low confidence|accepted optional gap|critical source gap
when_section_unavailable: Show confidence as blocked or review until evidence exists

contribution_display: Show market separately from private model value
warning_display: Show missing market|stale market|neutral market placeholder
when_section_unavailable: Show market unavailable and do not create fake edge

contribution_display: Show rule context separately from Dynasty Asset Value
warning_display: Show league rank is rule signal not player quality
when_section_unavailable: Show rule context unavailable and block forced-release explanation only
